summary: Complete backend testing of notification API endpoints for GreenLink Agritech. All 5 requested endpoints tested and working correctly: GET/PUT preferences, POST register-device, GET history, POST test notification.
critical_code_review_comments: All notification endpoints properly require authentication (return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
Preferences endpoint returns correct default values (all true except marketing=false)
Device registration endpoint handles both new registrations and updates to existing tokens
Weekly reminders endpoint correctly restricts access to admin users only (returns 403 for cooperative)
Test notification endpoint correctly reports device count and delivery status
seed_data_creation: Test push tokens registered during testing: ExponentPushToken[TEST_*] pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification endpoints fully tested. Uses Expo Push Notifications (not Firebase FCM). Test tokens are registered but real push delivery requires physical device. Mocked: Expo Push Service (simulated without real device token).

features_verified.GET /api/notifications/preferences: PASS - Returns default preferences (premium_available=true, payment_confirmed=true, weekly_reminders=true, coop_announcements=true, harvest_updates=true, marketing=false)
features_verified.PUT /api/notifications/preferences: PASS - Updates preferences successfully, returns {success: true, preferences: {...}}
features_verified.POST /api/notifications/register-device: PASS - Registers new device or updates existing. Requires push_token, platform, optional device_name
features_verified.GET /api/notifications/history: PASS - Returns {notifications: [], count: N}. Supports ?limit= parameter
features_verified.POST /api/notifications/test: PASS - Returns {success: bool, devices_notified: N, total_devices: N}. Without real device, success=false with devices_notified=0

additional_endpoints_tested.GET /api/notifications/pending-sms: PASS - Returns pending SMS queue for SMS gateway integration

mocked_apis_confirmed: Expo Push Service (simulated without real device token - notifications cannot be delivered to test tokens)
